Precondition: Both end effectors grasp nothing; box_2 is on top of box_1.
Postcondition: box_2 has been pushed from its right side and may fall to the ground.

Precondition: Both end effectors grasp nothing; box_1 is accessible from left and right.
Postcondition: box_1 is grasped with dual-arm symmetric contact on its right & left sides.
